Albatroxx – Our Most Advanced Parakite Yet!

The Albatroxx is our latest and most advanced parakite. Built based on the Mullet and MuletX. This glider takes parakite performance to a whole new level, delivering unmatched speed, efficiency and handling.

Enhanced Performance & Design
With a higher aspect ratio and an increased cell count of 65, the Albatroxx offers superior aerodynamics. This translates to greater top speed, a more dynamic dive and is a more efficient glider.

Refined Handling & Energy Conversion
The Albatroxx has superior energy conversion. Its higher aspect ratio allows for crisper turns, smoother control inputs and a more responsive feel, setting it apart from anything else in our lineup.

[/et_pb_text][/et_pb_column][et_pb_column type=”1_2″ _builder_version=”4.16″ _module_preset=”default” global_colors_info=”{}”][et_pb_text _builder_version=”4.27.4″ _module_preset=”default” custom_margin=”||14px|||” hover_enabled=”0″ global_colors_info=”{}” sticky_enabled=”0″]

Increased Efficiency & Size Advantage
As the most efficient parakite in our range, the Albatroxx provides incredible lift and glide capabilities. This means pilots can fly a smaller size compared to the Mulet or MuletX while maintaining exceptional performance.

Ideal for Skilled Coastal & Speed Flyers
Whether you’re a coastal flyer looking for precision and control or a speed flyer exploring dynamic dive capabilities the Albatroxx delivers it all. Its high-performance design ensures confidence-inspiring stability and an impressive flare.

Discover your Flow with the Albatroxx! Available in sizes 13, 16, 19, and 22.

SOLIDITY | REFLEX PROFILE

[/et_pb_text][/et_pb_column][/et_pb_row][et_pb_row column_structure=”2_5,3_5″ use_custom_gutter=”on” make_equal=”on” _builder_version=”4.27.4″ _module_preset=”default” max_width=”1110px” locked=”off” global_colors_info=”{}”][et_pb_column type=”2_5″ _builder_version=”4.16″ _module_preset=”default” global_colors_info=”{}”][et_pb_image src=”https://www.flowparagliders.com.au/wp-content/uploads/2025/02/albatroxx-decour-image-3-1.jpg” title_text=”albatroxx-decour-image-3 (1)” _builder_version=”4.27.4″ _module_preset=”default” global_colors_info=”{}”][/et_pb_image][/et_pb_column][et_pb_column type=”3_5″ _builder_version=”4.27.4″ _module_preset=”default” global_colors_info=”{}”][et_pb_text _builder_version=”4.27.4″ _module_preset=”default” custom_margin=”||14px|||” global_colors_info=”{}”]

The Albatroxx airfoil is designed to provide a safe and enjoyable experience, especially when it comes to resistance against collapses.

With just a pull on the A-lines, this wing demonstrates exceptional resistance to collapsing. Practically making it theoretically non-collapsible. This advanced safety feature ensures pilots can perform diving manoeuvres confidently, even in extreme conditions without the fear of the glider collapsing.

It offers the perfect combination of stability and excitement, delivering unmatched reassurance in the sky when it matters most.

[/et_pb_text][/et_pb_column][/et_pb_row][/et_pb_section][et_pb_section fb_built=”1″ custom_padding_last_edited=”on|phone” _builder_version=”4.24.0″ _module_preset=”default” background_enable_color=”off” background_enable_video_mp4=”off” custom_padding=”50px||34px||false|false” custom_padding_tablet=”20px||||false|false” custom_padding_phone=”20px||||false|false” global_colors_info=”{}”][et_pb_row use_custom_gutter=”on” gutter_width=”2″ make_equal=”on” _builder_version=”4.17.4″ _module_preset=”default” background_color=”#0a0a0a” max_width=”1110px” custom_padding=”15px|21px|6px|21px|false|true” global_colors_info=”{}”][et_pb_column type=”4_4″ _builder_version=”4.17.4″ _module_preset=”default” background_enable_color=”off” background_enable_image=”off” animation_direction=”right” global_colors_info=”{}”][et_pb_text _builder_version=”4.16″ _module_preset=”default” header_font=”Oswald|600||on|||||” header_text_align=”center” header_text_color=”#FFFFFF” header_line_height=”1.3em” header_3_font=”Gruppo|700|||||||” header_3_text_align=”left” header_3_text_color=”#FFFFFF” header_3_font_size=”17px” header_4_font=”Oswald|700||on|||||” header_4_text_align=”center” header_4_text_color=”#171a25″ header_4_font_size=”40px” header_4_letter_spacing=”-0.2px” background_enable_color=”off” module_alignment=”center” header_4_font_size_tablet=”” header_4_font_size_phone=”30px” header_4_font_size_last_edited=”on|phone” global_colors_info=”{}”]

MATERIALS

[/et_pb_text][/et_pb_column][/et_pb_row][et_pb_row column_structure=”2_5,3_5″ use_custom_gutter=”on” make_equal=”on” _builder_version=”4.27.4″ _module_preset=”default” max_width=”1110px” locked=”off” global_colors_info=”{}”][et_pb_column type=”2_5″ _builder_version=”4.16″ _module_preset=”default” global_colors_info=”{}”][et_pb_image src=”https://www.flowparagliders.com.au/wp-content/uploads/2025/02/albatroxx-materials-image-1-1.jpg” title_text=”albatroxx-materials-image-1 (1)” _builder_version=”4.27.4″ _module_preset=”default” global_colors_info=”{}”][/et_pb_image][et_pb_text _builder_version=”4.27.4″ _module_preset=”default” custom_margin=”||14px|||” global_colors_info=”{}”]

*Materials carefully selected for a taught and durable canopy

Skytex 38g- Top and bottom surface

MJ 32mf – Bottom Surface

Skytex 40g Hard – Diagonals and profile

[/et_pb_text][/et_pb_column][et_pb_column type=”3_5″ _builder_version=”4.27.4″ _module_preset=”default” global_colors_info=”{}”][et_pb_image src=”https://www.flowparagliders.com.au/wp-content/uploads/2025/02/albatroxx-materials-image-2-1.jpg” title_text=”albatroxx-materials-image-2 (1)” _builder_version=”4.27.4″ _module_preset=”default” global_colors_info=”{}”][/et_pb_image][/et_pb_column][/et_pb_row][/et_pb_section][et_pb_section fb_built=”1″ custom_padding_last_edited=”on|phone” _builder_version=”4.24.0″ _module_preset=”default” background_enable_color=”off” background_enable_video_mp4=”off” custom_padding=”50px||34px||false|false” custom_padding_tablet=”20px||||false|false” custom_padding_phone=”20px||||false|false” global_colors_info=”{}”][et_pb_row use_custom_gutter=”on” gutter_width=”2″ make_equal=”on” _builder_version=”4.17.4″ _module_preset=”default” background_color=”#0a0a0a” max_width=”1110px” custom_padding=”15px|21px|6px|21px|false|true” global_colors_info=”{}”][et_pb_column type=”4_4″ _builder_version=”4.17.4″ _module_preset=”default” background_enable_color=”off” background_enable_image=”off” animation_direction=”right” global_colors_info=”{}”][et_pb_text _builder_version=”4.27.4″ _module_preset=”default” header_font=”Oswald|600||on|||||” header_text_align=”center” header_text_color=”#FFFFFF” header_line_height=”1.3em” header_3_font=”Gruppo|700|||||||” header_3_text_align=”left” header_3_text_color=”#FFFFFF” header_3_font_size=”17px” header_4_font=”Oswald|700||on|||||” header_4_text_align=”center” header_4_text_color=”#171a25″ header_4_font_size=”40px” header_4_letter_spacing=”-0.2px” background_enable_color=”off” module_alignment=”center” header_4_font_size_tablet=”” header_4_font_size_phone=”30px” header_4_font_size_last_edited=”on|phone” global_colors_info=”{}”]

excerpt.rendered: TECHNICAL DATA COLOURS Albatroxx – Our Most Advanced Parakite Yet! The Albatroxx is our latest and most advanced parakite. Built based on the Mullet and MuletX. This glider takes parakite performance to a whole new level, delivering unmatched speed, efficiency and handling. Enhanced Performance & DesignWith a higher aspect ratio and an increased cell count […]
